# The Micro Agent Company

> AI agents that handle content, admin, research, sales, support, and growth for freelancers, creators, and small businesses (UMKM).

## Vision
To make AI agents as essential to small businesses and independent creators as a spreadsheet or a phone.

## Mission
We build simple, affordable AI agents that handle real work so business owners can focus on what only they can do.

## Main Pages
- [Home](https://www.themicroagentcompany.biz.id/): Overview of AI agent categories and use cases
- [About](https://www.themicroagentcompany.biz.id/about): Company vision, mission, and founder story
- [Products](https://www.themicroagentcompany.biz.id/products): AI agent product offerings
- [Agents](https://www.themicroagentcompany.biz.id/agents): List of available AI agents by category
- [Use Cases](https://www.themicroagentcompany.biz.id/use-cases): Real-world application examples
- [Pricing](https://www.themicroagentcompany.biz.id/pricing): Plans and pricing
- [Services](https://www.themicroagentcompany.biz.id/services): Managed VPS setup and AI agent services
- [Docs](https://www.themicroagentcompany.biz.id/docs): Technical documentation
- [MicroClaw](https://www.themicroagentcompany.biz.id/products/microclaw): OpenClaw managed hosting for UMKM Indonesia
- [Waitlist](https://www.themicroagentcompany.biz.id/waitlist): Join the waitlist
